summary.lv: Sun Finance Group meklē Data Scientist Āfrikas tirgus atbalstam – datu analīzes, prognozēšanas modeļu izstrāde un ieviešana dinamiskā fintech vidē.
summary.en: Sun Finance Group seeks a Data Scientist to support the Africa market team with exploratory analysis, predictive model development, and implementation in a fast-growing fintech environment.
